headline: Need help building or fixing something technical?
body: Internship opportunities, freelance work, websites, dashboards, backend systems, IT support, or a quick technical question — send a short note and I will reply as soon as I can.

placeholders.name: Your name
placeholders.subject: Internship, freelance project, or technical help
placeholders.message: Tell me about the role, project, timeline, stack, or anything useful.
